Longtime Austin civic figure and philanthropist who runs MDW Interests, a private oil, gas and real estate investment firm registered in Austin. Co-founder and president of the Waller Creek Conservancy (now Waterloo Greenway), former facilities chair at St. Edward's University, and instrumental in the merger creating The Contemporary Austin. Despite the 'Unemployed / None' occupation on the filing, her business identity is documented in public press releases. Her 213 federal contributions with a near-uniform Democratic lean are consistent with the civic-donor profile; no ideological PAC tie (pro-Israel, pro-Palestine, gun, or defense) was found in public records.
